examples: Located near the base of the neck, the thyroid is a large endocrine gland that produces hormones that help control growth and metabolism.
You may have a thyroid problem.
Swab neck skin with Betadine where thyroid area is.
Radioactive iodine caused thousands of cases of thyroid cancer in children after the Chernobyl accident.
Patients are at higher risk for Type 1 diabetes, mellitus, collagen vascular diseases, autoimmune thyroid disease.
